hero.subtext: Small-batch blends from organic farms. No fillers, no shortcuts — just honest flavour that transforms every meal.

brandStory.quote: "We believe the best meals start with the best ingredients."
brandStory.heading: Our Story
paragraphs: Wild Thyme began in a sun-drenched kitchen when we couldn't find spices that tasted as alive as the ones we remembered from our grandparents' garden. So we decided to make them ourselves.

Today we work directly with growers in India, Morocco, and the Mediterranean. Every batch is roasted, ground, and packed by hand in our workshop — ensuring you get the same care we'd give our own family table.
No bulk warehouses. No stale shelves. Just fresh, full-bodied flavour, one jar at a time.

products.name: Signature Blend
products.description: Our best-selling mix of smoked paprika, cumin, and a touch of orange. Perfect for grilling and roasted vegetables.

products.name: Berbere
products.description: Warm, complex Ethiopian-inspired blend with fenugreek, cardamom, and chili. Ideal for stews and lentils.

products.name: Za'atar
products.description: Toasted sesame, sumac, and wild thyme. Drizzle with olive oil and spread on flatbread or roasted roots.

products.name: Garam Masala
products.description: Freshly ground cinnamon, clove, and black cardamom. The soul of countless curries and chai.

usp.title: 100% Organic
usp.description: Sourced from certified organic farms. No pesticides, no compromise.

usp.title: Hand-Packed
usp.description: Every jar is filled and sealed by hand in our workshop for maximum freshness.

usp.title: Direct from Growers
usp.description: We work directly with farmers — fair prices for them, better flavour for you.

usp.title: Plastic-Free Packaging
usp.description: Recyclable glass jars and compostable labels. Good for the planet, not just the palate.

testimonials.quote: I've never tasted spices this fresh. The Berbere transformed my weekly lentil soup into something I actually look forward to.
testimonials.author: Maya Chen

testimonials.quote: Finally, a company that cares about where their spices come from. The packaging is beautiful and the flavour is unmatched.
testimonials.author: James Okonkwo

testimonials.quote: Wild Thyme's Signature Blend is now a permanent fixture on our grill. Our guests always ask what we use.
testimonials.author: Elena Vasquez

newsletter.heading: Join the Flavour Journey
newsletter.body: Get recipes, farm stories, and early access to new blends. No spam — just good taste.
